name: Architectural Wave Board
shortDesc: Premium CNC-sculpted textures for high-end interiors.
fullDesc: Transform plain walls into dynamic architectural features. Our Wave Boards are precision-carved using 3-axis CNC technology to create seamless, flowing patterns that play with light and shadow.

name: 3D Wood Carving
shortDesc: Intricate 3D sculptures and relief carvings with exceptional depth.
fullDesc: Bring your artistic vision to life with our high-precision 3D wood carving services. From detailed mythological figures to contemporary abstract art, our 5-axis machines can sculpt complex geometries with lifelike detail.

name: 2D & V-Groove Carving
shortDesc: Precision flat engraving for signage, panels, and decorative elements.
fullDesc: Perfect for doors, cabinets, and branding elements. Our 2D carving service offers clean, sharp lines and intricate V-groove patterns that add sophistication to any flat surface.

name: Precision Metal CNC
shortDesc: Industrial-grade metal machining for critical parts and dies.
fullDesc: When tolerances matter, trust our Metal CNC services. We handle steel, aluminum, and brass with micron-level accuracy, suitable for molds, dies, and aerospace components.
